AI for simple support is everywhere. Complex customer operations demand Front.
Only Front brings teams, conversations, and AI into one coordinated system, so customer operations stay fast, accurate, and in control.

Trusted by 9,000+ companies
Complexity is where most customer support platforms tap out
Teams lack shared context
Scattered tools mean incomplete context and customers who have to repeat themselves
AI stops at simple questions
Other AI tools can only handle simple FAQs, not real-world, complex requests
Resolution slows to a crawl
Your agents shouldn't spend half their time fixing what AI got wrong
Where cross-team customer operations stops crossing wires
FRONT AI
Resolve up to 70% of requests with AI, not just the low-hanging fruit
Front AI takes on complex requests others escalate by automating responses, assisting teams, and analyzing quality across your entire operation. Every reply improves with each conversation.
Explore Front AI
CUSTOMER SUPPORT
Complex tickets span departments, your system should too
Tackle high-stakes inquiries with full customer context and shared visibility across every team and conversation. Route, escalate, or loop in the right team to resolve issues without dropping the ball.
Front for customer support
OPERATIONS
Tame the inbox chaos and tackle the workflows your business depends on
Coordinate across teams and systems from one centralized AI command center.  Eliminate bottlenecks and keep complex customer requests moving across your organization.
Front for complex operations
The more complex the operation, the clearer the choice.
Front’s AI doesn’t just reply. It runs the operation. G2 proves who’s built for complex work.

Cookie Settings
Cookie Notice
We use services provided by social media and advertising companies that use cookies and similar technologies ("cookies") to collect information about your device and activity on our sites and other online services. These companies use this information to try to tailor the ads you see online to your interests, as well as to enable features that let you share content on their social platforms. This activity may involve the processing of personal information from which you have the right to opt-out under certain state laws. You can opt-out of this activity by deselecting the “Advertising and Social Media Cookies” toggle below. If you opt-out, note that the opt-out is specific to each browser and device, so you will need to opt-out on every browser and device that you use. If you visit us after clearing your cookies, you will need to opt-out again. We may also share users' contact data with our advertising partners to facilitate interest-based advertising on their social media platforms to those individuals or others with similar traits. To opt-out of sales/sharing resulting from this activity, send your opt-out request to privacy@front.com.
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
Advertising and Social Media Cookies
Advertising and Social Media Cookies
Advertising cookies are set by our advertising partners to collect information about your use of the site, our communications, and other online services over time and with different browsers and devices. They use this information to show you ads online that they think will interest you and measure the ads’ performance. Social media cookies are set by social media platforms to enable you to share content on those platforms, and are capable of tracking information about your activity across other online services for use as described in their privacy policies.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Frequently asked questions
What are your Success Services packages and how much do they cost?
Front offers 3 Success Services packages: Professional Onboarding, Enterprise Onboarding, and Success Services project hours.
You can view pricing and what's included in each package here.
To ensure you're set up for success, we require an onboarding package be purchased for contracts over $25k.
How does Front’s free trial work? Do I need a credit card?
Our free 14-day trial offers all the features available in our Professional plan. You can get started without a credit card and can upgrade at any time during your trial. You do not need a credit card to start, continue, or complete your Front trial.
What is a seat?
A seat is a paid Front license that can be granted to a unique user in your organization.
What is a channel?
A channel is the communication medium that people use to get in touch with you like email, SMS, Front Chat, WhatsApp, and more.
Can I connect multiple channel types with the Starter plan?
No, the Starter plan only supports a single channel type of Email, Front Chat, or SMS. The Professional and Enterprise plan support multiple channel types.
What is the maximum number of channels per plan?
Your channel maximum depends on both your plan and number of licenses. On Starter, you can connect up to 10 channels per license, with Professional up to 30 per license, and with Enterprise up to 50 per license. For example, a team of 5 users on Professional would have a maximum of 150 channels.
Please see our help article for more details
.
Which providers power Front AI features?
We’re using OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Amazon AWS, which are industry-leading AI providers. Specifically, we use the text generation API.
How is my data processed? Is my data protected?
While we may use your data to further train your model, your data will never be cross-contaminated with other companies’ data. We also have extensive agreements in place with our AI providers to ensure that they’re not training their foundational models on any data that we send to them.
How can I learn more about Front’s security and compliance best practices?
Ensuring your data’s confidentiality, integrity, and availability is core to our mission and platform.
Read more here
about Front’s security, privacy and compliance practices. You also may request access to our security documentation by reaching out to your sales representative.
Can I combine seats across multiple plans?
No, plans are assigned at the organization level. You can add or remove seats as needed within a single plan.
Can I pay with my bank instead of my credit card?
You can pay by wire transfer or ACH if you purchase annually and the total contract value is over $12K. Reach out to
billing@front.com
to have your payment method updated.

Professional
Starter
NEW FEATURE
May 8, 2026
Seamlessly manage Zoom Contact Center calls and SMS in Front
Zoom Contact Center is an AI-first, omnichannel contact-center-as-a-service solution built to empower agents to deliver a total customer experience across multiple digital channels. With the Zoom Contact Center integration, Front users can seamlessly manage SMS and voice channels directly alongside email, live chat, and more in one unified workspace. Here’s what you can do with the new Zoom Contact Center + Front integration: Manage Zoom Contact Center calls and SMS right from your Front inbox Tag teammates and collaborate live on transcripts View customer details instantly during a call Keep agents focused with automatic “busy” status updates Learn more
Related products
:
Professional
Enterprise
0
38
0
P
23 days ago
NEW FEATURE
May 8, 2026
New Integrations: One, RipeText, Tabi Connect
We've added new integrations to help your team automate work, surface insights from conversations, and quote customers faster—right from Front. One: One is an integration runtime and command center for AI agents, giving them authenticated access to 38,000+ tools across 200+ platforms—including Gmail, Slack, Stripe, and HubSpot—through a single CLI. It handles OAuth, token refresh, rate limiting, and full API knowledge so agents can take actions across apps without manual wiring. With the Front integration, mutual customers can connect via OAuth and work with their Front data directly from One's AI ChatBot playground or via the API using One Passthrough. Developers can also chain multi-step workflows, set up event-driven triggers, schedule recurring tasks, and deploy agents to channels like Slack or WhatsApp. RipeText: RipeText is a Performance OS for support teams—an AI layer that reads every conversation to spot issues, prevent churn, and coach agents automatically. Surveys capture only a fraction of feedback while most churn risk hides inside conversations, so RipeText flags emerging problems and trains agents before revenue walks out the door. Linking RipeText to Front takes just a couple of clicks: once connected, it ingests part of your historic content and continuously tracks new support threads, processing everything for insights. Tabi Connect: Tabi is a rate management system that streamlines quoting by letting users generate, edit, and send shipment quotes directly from their email, with real-time pricing adjustments and automated data extraction. The Front integration lets teammates read incoming messages and extract shipment details directly in their sidebar, then sends that information to Tabi Connect to generate quotes in real time. Once reviewed or adjusted, the response is automatically inserted back into your email draft, ready to send.

Feature Update
Apr 30, 2026
Connect Guru and Confluence as AI knowledge sources — with better sync visibility
Now you can connect Guru and Confluence as knowledge sources in Front AI settings, giving Copilot and Autopilot access to private knowledge bases for more informed responses. We've also made it easier to understand how your content is processed. Open any knowledge source to see which articles were included vs. excluded, get clear reasons when something is filtered out, and see suggested actions for improving your sync. Learn more about connecting third-party knowledge sources .

Feature Update
Apr 30, 2026
Support customers in any language, across channels
AI Translate is now supported across all chat-like channels — SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Front Chat, and custom channels — so you can quickly translate messages and support customers in their preferred language. Learn how to translate messages using AI.

Feature Update
Apr 30, 2026
New analytics updates: tasks, custom fields in custom reports, and active accounts
We've added three new analytics updates to help you better understand team performance, track internal workflows, and monitor customer demand. Task analytics : Track task volume and resolution efficiency in shared inboxes with three new metrics: new tasks , resolved tasks , and task resolution time (avg) . Use these to spot bottlenecks and measure how quickly your team closes out work. Group custom report data by conversation custom fields: Now table charts in custom report dashboards support "Yes or no" and "Dropdown" conversation custom fields as grouping dimensions, so you can break down metrics by fields like issue type or location. Active accounts : Active accounts is a new metric tracking the number of unique customers who reached out over a given period, now available in custom, customer satisfaction, and workload reports. Use it to understand whether support demand is broad or concentrated, and anticipate resourcing needs.
0
38

1 month ago
Feature Update
Apr 30, 2026
Control which facts are used in AI replies
When reviewing AI replies that draw from similar conversations, admins can now invalidate specific facts directly from the source pill. This is useful for flagging facts from old conversations that are no longer accurate. Just click the trash icon next to any fact to stop it from being used in future replies. Invalidated facts appear with a strikethrough wherever they appear, and can be re-enabled at any time by clicking the trash icon again. Learn more about fact invalidation.

Feature Update
Apr 29, 2026
Get an AI assistant that sees the full customer relationship with the all-new Copilot
The all-new Copilot gives your team an AI assistant built directly into their inbox, pulling together account history, past conversations, and context from connected tools like your CRM and billing systems in real time. Use Copilot to find how similar issues were handled, get answers from your knowledge base and connected systems, and understand the full state of a customer relationship before responding — so your team arrives at every interaction ready to act, not scrambling to catch up. Copilot is available as an add-on for $20/seat/month our current plans, or included in the latest Enterprise plan. Learn more.
Related products
:
Enterprise
0
56
0
P
1 month ago
New Release
Apr 28, 2026
Embed AI-powered self-service directly into your app or website
Let customers complete requests from start to finish, without waiting for an agent. Embedded directly in your app or website, Resolve runs Autopilot Playbooks to handle everything from quick questions to complex multi-step workflows. For requests that need a human, Resolve creates a ticket with full context already captured so your team can step in immediately without starting from scratch. Autopilot Playbooks and Resolve are part of the Autopilot add-on and must be enabled by the Front team. Join the waitlist .
0
43
0
P
1 month ago
Apr 28, 2026
Automate complex, multi-step customer workflows end to end with Autopilot Playbooks
Autopilot Playbooks let you define how complex work gets done: what information needs to be collected, what actions need to happen across which systems, and when to hand off to a teammate. Once defined, Autopilot runs the process: gathering missing details, taking action across connected systems, handling back-and-forth conversations, and adapting when things don't go as expected. Playbooks are built for the routine, high-volume work that requires coordination across teams and systems, so your team can focus on the cases that genuinely need human judgment. Autopilot Playbooks and Resolve are part of the Autopilot add-on and must be enabled by the Front team. Join the waitlist .
0
78
0
P
1 month ago
NEW FEATURE
Apr 3, 2026
New Integrations: Beep, BuildBetter, Burt, Maton, ScreenReply, Solo
We’ve added new integrations to help your team automate work, access knowledge instantly, and communicate more effectively—right from Front. Beep: Beep brings voice messaging into Front’s composer and sidebar, so you can record and send audio messages (with transcripts) in conversations and internal comments. It’s a faster, more personal way to explain complex issues or collaborate with your team. BuildBetter: BuildBetter helps you extract structured, actionable insights from your Front conversations. By syncing your customer data, it automatically analyzes, summarizes, and documents feedback—so your team can uncover trends, prioritize improvements, and drive retention, expansion, and conversion without manual work. Burt: Burt’s AI teammates understand logistics workflows out of the box. By connecting to your Front inbox, Burt reads incoming emails in real time and triggers actions like tracking updates, document processing, or handling quote requests—so your team can skip manual work and focus on customers. Maton: Maton connects Front with 100+ business apps and lets you build multi-step workflows using natural language. Automatically sync conversations, contacts, and tags across tools, create CRM records from new messages, or route conversations based on Front data—all without writing code. ScreenReply: ScreenReply lets you request screen recordings with a single link, no downloads required. Recordings are automatically added to your Front conversations as internal notes, complete with AI-generated summaries and timecodes. Solo: Solo is an AI-powered knowledge assistant that pulls directly from your codebase and connected sources to answer product and technical questions. With the Front integration, teammates can ask questions right from the inbox and get accurate, up-to-date answers without switching tools.
Related products
:
Starter
Professional
Enterprise
0
59
0
P
1 month ago
FEATURE UPDATE
Apr 3, 2026
Easily build macros and dynamic variables with AI
You can now create and refine both macros and dynamic variables using AI—no manual setup required. With the new Build with AI option available in the flow builder and dynamic variable panel, simply describe what you want in plain language. AI will generate the full macro decision tree or dynamic variable for you in seconds. Once generated, you’ll see exactly what changed, so you can Keep, Undo, or refine the result until it’s just right. Whether you're automating workflows or personalizing content, AI makes it faster and easier to build exactly what you need—right where you’re already working. Building macros with AI are available on Professional and Enterprise plans while building dynamic variables with AI is available on Enterprise plans only.
Related products
:
Professional
Enterprise
0
50
0
P
1 month ago
FEATURE UPDATE
Mar 6, 2026
New Autopilot, Copilot, and Smart QA reporting improvements
New updates to the Autopilot and Copilot reports let you break down results by topic and teammate so you can see which topics Autopilot handles best and spot adoption gaps and coaching opportunities. You can also now track average Smart QA scores and team performance over time. Discover how Front’s latest AI reporting updates give you greater control and clarity over your team’s AI performance: Copilot Report : With the new Copilot by teammate table, it’s now easier than ever to track AI adoption by teammate. You can also track new metrics including: Suggested replies (%) Suggested replies sent (%) Suggested replies sent with minor edits (%) Copilot report is available with access to the Copilot add-on. Autopilot Report : See which topics Autopilot handles best with the new Autopilot by topic table. New metrics include: Conversations with Autopilot (%) Conversations resolved by Autopilot (%) Conversations handed off by Autopilot (%) Replies to resolution (avg) Autopilot replies to resolution (avg) Teammate replies to resolution (avg) CSAT score (%) Autopilot CSAT score (%) Teammate CSAT score (%) Autopilot report is available with access to the Autopilot add-on. Smart QA Report : Track service quality scores and monitor performance trends across your team with the new Smart QA score and Smart QA score over time charts. You can also have Smart QA reports delivered to your inbox by scheduling email deliveries. Smart QA report is available with access to the Smart QA add-on.

Cookie Policy
Google User Data Privacy Notice
Status
Your Privacy Choices
We and our partners may monitor and record your information. By continuing into our site, you agree to the storing of cookies and similar technologies for functional, analytics, and advertising purposes pursuant to our
Terms of Use
,
Cookie Policy
and
Privacy Notice
.  You may opt out and manage your privacy preferences through the Cookie Settings below.
Cookie Settings
Cookie Notice
We use services provided by social media and advertising companies that use cookies and similar technologies ("cookies") to collect information about your device and activity on our sites and other online services. These companies use this information to try to tailor the ads you see online to your interests, as well as to enable features that let you share content on their social platforms. This activity may involve the processing of personal information from which you have the right to opt-out under certain state laws. You can opt-out of this activity by deselecting the “Advertising and Social Media Cookies” toggle below. If you opt-out, note that the opt-out is specific to each browser and device, so you will need to opt-out on every browser and device that you use. If you visit us after clearing your cookies, you will need to opt-out again. We may also share users' contact data with our advertising partners to facilitate interest-based advertising on their social media platforms to those individuals or others with similar traits. To opt-out of sales/sharing resulting from this activity, send your opt-out request to privacy@front.com.
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
Advertising and Social Media Cookies
Advertising and Social Media Cookies
Advertising cookies are set by our advertising partners to collect information about your use of the site, our communications, and other online services over time and with different browsers and devices. They use this information to show you ads online that they think will interest you and measure the ads’ performance. Social media cookies are set by social media platforms to enable you to share content on those platforms, and are capable of tracking information about your activity across other online services for use as described in their privacy policies.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

analysis.name: Front
analysis.tagline: Customer service platform — powered by AI, designed for humans
analysis.value_proposition: Front unifies teams, conversations, and AI into one coordinated system so complex B2B customer operations stay fast, accurate, and in control.
analysis.ideal_customer: B2B companies with multi-department customer operations needing cross-team coordination on high-complexity support, ops, or account management workflows

features.name: shared inbox
features.description: Collaborative inbox for managing conversations across teams with shared visibility
features.evidence_quote: Track and manage important conversations, customized across specific inboxes, tags, and assignees

features.name: ticketing system
features.description: Track, organize, and resolve customer requests as tickets
features.evidence_quote: Track, organize, and resolve requests

features.name: omnichannel messaging
features.description: Unified inbox for email, SMS, social, WhatsApp, and more in a single workspace
features.evidence_quote: Omnichannel (email, SMS, social, WhatsApp, etc.)

features.name: live chat
features.description: Real-time customer chat support channel managed within Front
features.evidence_quote: Live chat — Chat people don't hate

features.name: ai autopilot
features.description: Omnichannel AI agent that autonomously handles complex customer work end-to-end
features.evidence_quote: Automate complex customer work with our omnichannel AI agent

features.name: ai copilot
features.description: Real-time AI assistant that helps agents get answers, decide next steps, and draft replies
features.evidence_quote: Get answers, decide next steps, and draft replies

features.name: smart qa
features.description: AI-powered QA scorecards and reporting that automates quality review of agent conversations
features.evidence_quote: Automate QA with AI-powered scorecards and reporting for your review

features.name: smart csat
features.description: AI-inferred customer satisfaction scores without requiring explicit customer surveys
features.evidence_quote: Infer and track customer satisfaction scores without surveys

features.name: ai topics
features.description: AI-powered categorization to understand the most common customer contact reasons
features.evidence_quote: Understand your most common customer contact reasons

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Hosted public help center and internal documentation for self-service and agent reference
features.evidence_quote: Host a help center or internal docs

features.name: multi-language knowledge base
features.description: Knowledge base supporting multiple languages for global customer bases
features.evidence_quote: Customizable and multi-language

features.name: workflow automation rules
features.description: No-code rules to automatically tag, route, assign, and act on conversations
features.evidence_quote: Tag, route, and more automatically — Up to 10 rules

features.name: smart rules
features.description: Advanced automation rules available at Enterprise tier for complex conditional logic
features.evidence_quote: Smart rules

features.name: macros
features.description: Saved reply templates and action sequences for common workflows
features.evidence_quote: Macros and up to 20 rules

features.name: workspaces
features.description: Segment inboxes into separate spaces with their own workflows, analytics, and resources
features.evidence_quote: Workspaces are a way to divide up your inboxes into separate spaces with their own workflows, analytics

features.name: analytics and reporting
features.description: Dashboards and reports covering team performance, CSAT, and SLA tracking
features.evidence_quote: Report on team performance, CSAT, and SLAs

features.name: custom reports
features.description: Enterprise-tier custom analytics reports with configurable fields and metrics
features.evidence_quote: Custom reports

features.name: task analytics
features.description: Track task volume and resolution efficiency in shared inboxes with dedicated metrics
features.evidence_quote: Track task volume and resolution efficiency in shared inboxes with three new metrics: new tasks

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on support for enterprise identity providers
features.evidence_quote: Multiple workspaces, SSO, and SCIM

features.name: scim
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via SCIM protocol
features.evidence_quote: SSO, SCIM, and custom roles

features.name: custom roles and permissions
features.description: Granular access control with configurable roles and permission sets
features.evidence_quote: SSO, SCIM, and custom roles

features.name: internal comments
features.description: Leave internal notes on conversations for teammate collaboration without customer visibility
features.evidence_quote: We love that we can leave a comment on an email [in Front] and escalate it, and we know that nothing will get lost

features.name: tagging
features.description: Manual and automated tagging of conversations to categorize and route work
features.evidence_quote: We use tagging automation extensively. It's so flexible, yet powerful

features.name: ai translate
features.description: AI-powered in-conversation translation across SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Front Chat, and custom channels
features.evidence_quote: AI Translate is now supported across all chat-like channels — SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Front Chat

features.name: third-party knowledge sources
features.description: Connect Guru and Confluence as AI knowledge sources for Copilot and Autopilot
features.evidence_quote: connect Guru and Confluence as knowledge sources in Front AI settings, giving Copilot and Autopilot access

features.name: chatbot builder
features.description: Visual chatbot with branching logic based on visitor data and dynamic variables
features.evidence_quote: Branching by visitor data in chatbots — Use dynamic variables to branch your chatbot flows

features.name: native whatsapp channel
features.description: Direct WhatsApp Business number connection to Front inbox, Meta-billed with admin fee
features.evidence_quote: Connect your WhatsApp Business numbers directly to Front — Meta-billed WhatsApp costs + 20% admin fee

features.name: zoom contact center integration
features.description: Manage Zoom Contact Center calls and SMS from within Front, with live transcript collaboration
features.evidence_quote: Manage Zoom Contact Center calls and SMS right from your Front inbox — Tag teammates and collaborate live on transcripts

features.name: salesforce integration
features.description: Sync with Salesforce for CRM data, with rule and macro templates for lead/task/opportunity creation
features.evidence_quote: Create lead in Salesforce; Send task to Salesforce; Create Salesforce opportunity

features.name: asana integration
features.description: Create and manage Asana tasks directly from Front conversations via rules and macros
features.evidence_quote: Create Asana task — Leverage rule and macro templates to take actions in Asana right from Front

features.name: api
features.description: REST API for building custom integrations and workflows, with rate-limit add-on available
features.evidence_quote: Increase your API rate limit to support the most complex workflows

features.name: api rate limit increase
features.description: Add-on to increase API rate limit for high-volume automation use cases
features.evidence_quote: $200 per 100 API requests/min per month — Available on all plans

features.name: cross-team routing
features.description: Route, escalate, or loop in the right team on complex tickets without dropping context
features.evidence_quote: Route, escalate, or loop in the right team to resolve issues without dropping the ball

features.name: customer context panel
features.description: View full customer history and details inline during conversations
features.evidence_quote: View customer details instantly during a call

features.name: automatic agent status
features.description: Automatically sets agent status to 'busy' during active calls to prevent interruptions
features.evidence_quote: Keep agents focused with automatic 'busy' status updates

features.name: views
features.description: Customizable inbox views filtered by tags, assignees, and conversation state
features.evidence_quote: Views — Create

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server for AI agent connectivity with Front data
features.evidence_quote: MCP server

features.name: custom fields in reports
features.description: Use custom fields as dimensions in custom analytics reports
features.evidence_quote: custom fields in custom reports

features.name: tailored onboarding services
features.description: Professional services for personalized onboarding, solution design, and change management
features.evidence_quote: Ensure your team achieves immediate productivity with a personalized onboarding experience

features.name: sla tracking
features.description: Monitor and report on service level agreement compliance
features.evidence_quote: Report on team performance, CSAT, and SLAs

features.name: no-code workflow builder
features.description: Build automation rules and workflows without writing code
features.evidence_quote: no-code workflows bring your entire stack into one shared view

features.name: outlook high priority tagging
features.description: Automatically tag emails marked high priority in Outlook using rules
features.evidence_quote: Tag Outlook high priority emails with rules

differentiators: Resolve up to 70% of requests with AI, not just the low-hanging fruit
Only Front brings teams, conversations, and AI into one coordinated system
AI doesn't just reply — it runs the operation
Built for cross-team coordination on complex tickets, not just single-agent FAQ deflection
Smart CSAT infers satisfaction without surveys
Smart QA automates quality review across all conversations, not just sampled ones

praised: "Front enabled us to transition from a one-dimensional Outlook email setup to a more dynamic platform with internal and external functionalities that we previously lacked." — Tony Peckham, Global Operations Director

"Front keeps everything trackable in one place. Our agents who've worked in support roles elsewhere say they love the way collaboration is handled in Front." — Liz Sanchez, Senior Customer Support Manager
"We use tagging automation extensively. It's so flexible, yet powerful—it lets us see where the biggest pain points and inefficiencies are across the business." — Rum Walia, COO
"After switching from Zendesk, we saw our productivity improve by 40% in our member support team managing email, text, and chat channels." — Joe Emison, CTO & Co-founder
"We love that we can leave a comment on an email and escalate it, and we know that nothing will get lost in Slack." — Laura Ene, Customer Success Team Lead
Cross-team collaboration and internal visibility widely praised as core differentiator
sources: landing (customer testimonials only — G2 source returned no data)

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Shared inbox, ticketing, AI Topics, up to 10 automation rules, basic analytics, public knowledge base; max 10 seats

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Omnichannel, macros, up to 20 rules, advanced analytics, up to 5 workspaces, SSO, SCIM; max 50 seats

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Smart rules, unlimited rules/macros, multi-language KB, custom roles, AI Copilot + Smart QA + Smart CSAT included

pricing.notes: Prices shown are annual billing; save 24% vs monthly. AI Autopilot is contact-sales only add-on on all tiers. AI Copilot ($20/seat/mo), Smart QA ($20/seat/mo), Smart CSAT ($10/seat/mo) are add-ons on Starter and Professional but included in Enterprise. Smart QA + Smart CSAT bundle available at $25/seat/mo. Native WhatsApp charged at Meta rates + 20% admin fee on Professional and Enterprise. API rate limit increase: $200/100 req/min/month on all plans. Starter capped at 10 seats; Professional capped at 50 seats; Enterprise has no stated seat cap.
